description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a deploy stage containing a pages job that uses the ubuntu:20.04 Docker image. The pages job runs only on branches matching the regex "master|website", executes the commands: apt update -qq; DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3-pip build-essential; git clone https://gitlab.com/sat-mtl/documentation/satie satie-doc; pushd satie-doc; git pull origin main; pip install -U sphinx; pip install -r requirements.txt; make htmlgitlab; popd; mv satie-doc/public public; and publishes the resulting public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Add a test stage with a test job that uses the metalabsat/supercollider:3.11.1 image with an empty entrypoint and defines the variable DEBUG_TESTS set to false. The test job is excluded from the website branch (rule if $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "website" when: never) and runs the commands: echo installing quarks; sclang ci/install_quarks.scd $CI_PROJECT_DIR; echo SATIE Test Debugging is "$DEBUG_TESTS"; jackd --no-realtime -d dummy -r 48000 -p 1024 &; sleep 10; sclang ci/run_tests.scd "$DEBUG_TESTS". No caches or additional artifacts are defined.
